rationale: Both correctly land on 'duplicate of #4808', matching the ground truth, but Y backs this with actual verification (grep confirms zero remaining get_cache_scale calls on main, direct read of the transformer file showing only a comment where the call used to be), giving a clean, directly actionable answer to the reporter (git pull, re-test). X asserts as fact that '#4808 is CLOSED and mergedAt is null — it never merged,' which is an unverified/likely fabricated GitHub-metadata claim that directly contradicts what Y actually confirmed in the code (the fix is present on main), undermining X's grounding and correctness despite its otherwise reasonable structural analysis and useful test-coverage-gap observation.
